title: JCEF Refunds TV + Mentor Handoff to Will (Lynh/Bonnie)
html:
TL;DR

  • Operational OSU freshman to-do: send JCEF refunds (including a TV purchase), finish ECON midterm packets, look into the app dev club, finish biz hw, store run for contact solution and plates — same JCEF gear-refund-loop pattern documented in 2021 09 15 m1 mac buy list (the M1 MacBook went through the same channel).
  • A TV is one of the JCEF-refundable items — clarifies that the JCEF disbursement model covers more than laptops; effectively any college-relevant gear is in scope.
  • Second half of the note is a mentor-handoff message to "Will": Yahir told his Ford mentor that Will hadn't been paired yet; she replied with contact info for Lynh and Bonnie at LVo@tfff.org (also a phone number — REDACTED for privacy). Yahir is brokering Ford-network access for a peer.
  • The handoff is a small but clean instance of the pay-it-forward debt of gratitude pattern — Yahir at 19 already routing scholarship infrastructure to other recipients.
  • Captured Oct 15, 2021 — fall midterm window of OSU freshman year, one week after the alternate universes brainstorm and one week before 2021 10 25 places for a date.

Key quotes

"So I mentioned to my Ford mentor that you hadn't been paired with a mentor yet. So she hit me back with some information (if you still want a mentor)."

"-send my jcef refunds including a tv purchase"

Privacy redaction

  • Phone number for Lynh redacted inline (kept email per public org domain).

Open questions

  • "Will" — first name only, identity unclear; possibly Will-from-the-OSU-Ford-cohort. Stub gate: not crossed at one mention.
  • Did the app dev club go anywhere? No follow-up note confirms attendance.

Connections
